---
name: Agent-Driven Issue
about: Structured request for AI-assisted development (Design, Debug, or Implementation)
title: "[AREA] Short descriptive title"
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement

- **Current Behavior**: Describe what is happening now.
- **Pain Point**: Why is this a problem? (Latency, complexity, bug, etc.)

## 🏁 Desired Outcome

- Describe the expected behavior after completion.
- Specify any technical constraints or required architectural patterns.

## 🛡️ Guardrails & Scope

- **Files Involved**: (Optional) Specific paths to focus on.
- **Constraints**: What should the AI *not* do?
- **Risk Level**: (Low/Medium/High) Impact on core systems.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] List verifiable conditions for "Done".
- [ ] No side effects on existing modules.
- [ ] Documentation/Handoff updated.

---
**Note for AI**: Prioritize token efficiency and strictly follow `.agent/rules/`.
